role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on soil color, vegetation density, and terrain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant species (coffee) and forest types.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on road surface, fencing materials, and infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Focused on camera generation artifacts and cross-domain synthesis.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Brazil. The agents provided solid, image-grounded evidence (red soil, coffee vegetation, wooden fencing). The linguistic agent correctly noted the absence of text. The meta agent's reliance on camera generation artifacts was a strong differentiator.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described red soil and vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Accurately described shrub rows and forest edge.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described dirt road and wooden posts.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described image quality and lighting.
